message:
fix(engine): use config settings in HybridLaneRouter constructor and add async eval integration tests

hybrid_lane_router.rs:
- Fix p99 latency index calculation to use (len-1)*99/100 instead of
  len*99/100, preventing off-by-one past the actual 99th percentile
- Use config's conformal and change_point settings in new() instead of
  default_config(), so custom configurations are respected immediately
- Remove redundant field reassignments in tests that are now unnecessary

module_async_evaluation_integration.rs:
- Add comprehensive integration test suite for async module evaluation
  covering settlement ordering, rejection propagation, suspension
  tracking, and dependency graph resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
